build.details: Build completed successfully with 3 warnings (all pre-existing performance recommendations unrelated to TextCard changes)

issues.description: 44 lint problems (11 errors, 33 warnings) - all pre-existing in other blocks
issues.note: None of the lint issues are in TextCard.tsx or TextCard.php - the modified files

registration.details: block.json correctly configured with apiVersion 3, proper attributes, parent constraint to takt/masonry-cards

attributes.details: All attributes (title, content, isTall) properly defined with correct types and defaults

fixVerification.details: font-bold successfully removed from both TSX (line 88) and PHP (line 47). Rendered h3 elements confirmed to have classes 'mb-4 break-words relative z-1 text-header-1' without font-bold.

verification.renderedHtml: h3 class contains 'mb-4 break-words relative z-1 text-header-1' - font-bold not present
verification.typographyTokens: text-header-1 and text-header-3 both define --font-weight: 400 in typography.css (lines 23, 27)

edgeCases.details: Test page includes comprehensive edge cases: short titles (1-4 chars), medium titles (6-19 chars), tall cards (isTall: true), 2/3/4 column layouts, masonry and aligned grid styles

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements - static text/image cards

accessibility.details: Semantic h3 elements for titles, proper heading hierarchy, text content accessible

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP produce identical class strings for h3 title elements. Both use conditional classes based on title length (text-header-1 for <=10 chars, text-header-3 for >10 chars) and isTall (md:pb-8).

notes.description: Manual attribute extraction pattern ($is_tall = $attributes['isTall'] ?? false;) found in TextCard.php line 15 and MasonryCards.php lines 10-11. This is a pre-existing pattern throughout the entire codebase (QuickLinks, CardsGrid, Footer, etc.). Theme's inc/helpers/blocks.php auto-extracts attributes on line 20, making manual extraction redundant. Not flagging as issue since it's consistent project-wide and not introduced by this fix.
notes.scope: project-wide pattern, not specific to this fix

specCompliance.details: Test page exists at https://ign.localhost/test-masonry-cards/ with 4 masonry-cards instances containing mix of text-card and image-card children. Variations cover 2/3/4 columns, masonry/aligned styles, short/medium/long titles, and tall cards.

passedChecks: font-bold removed from both TSX and PHP as specified in planning output
TSX/PHP class strings match exactly (both have 'mb-4 break-words relative z-1' without font-bold)
Typography tokens (text-header-1 and text-header-3) correctly define font-weight: 400
Rendered HTML confirmed to NOT contain font-bold class on h3 elements
Test page has 4 block instances with comprehensive variations
Block registration correct with apiVersion 3 and proper parent constraint

variations: 3-column masonry with buttons (5 cards: 3 text, 2 image)
4-column aligned masonry with one button (8 cards: 6 text, 2 image)

notes: This QA focused on verifying the font-weight fix as specified in the planning output (qaScope: design)
The fix is simple and targeted: removing font-bold from title classes to allow typography tokens to apply their intended font-weight: 400
No new functionality was added, only a CSS class removed from existing code
Manual attribute extraction pattern ($attributes['key']) is widespread throughout the theme but not introduced by this fix
